title: Installing Uniface on the iSeries
breadcrumbs: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries
text: Installing Uniface on the iSeries The Uniface installation program and related files are provided in a self-extracting zip file, which must be extracted to an IFS share. To install Uniface: Satisfy all requirements for installation on the iSeries. For more information, see iSeries Installation Requirements . Create a user profile for the owner of the Uniface product objects. For more information, see Create an installation user profile . Ensure that there is a TCP/IP port available, that TCP/IP is running, and that the domain is correctly configured. For more information, see Ensure TCP/IP Connectivity . Extract the distribution files to an IFS share on the iSeries and restore the installer. For more information, see Prepare to Install on iSeries . Install the Uniface product. For more information, see Install Uniface on iSeries . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
